title: Chammown #2540
definition:
Hammon = "warm springs"

 1) a town in Asher, apparently not far from Zidon-rabbah
 2) a town in Naphtali allotted to the Levites; also called 'Hammath'
    and 'Hammoth-dor'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hammon = "warm springs"

 1) a town in Asher, apparently not far from Zidon-rabbah
 2) a town in Naphtali allotted to the Levites; also called 'Hammath'
    and 'Hammoth-dor'

    NASB:  hot (spring), two cities, one in Asher and one in Naphtali
